scores.correctness_notes: Correctly demonstrates event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating over relation.units, and accessing app/unit databags. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: References 'RelationData' class which may not be exactly accurate (gold standard doesn't mention this class name). Also links to ops.readthedocs.io URL which may be fabricated/incorrect. Missing mention of Relation.load() with dataclasses/Pydantic which is in the gold standard but not hallucinated per se.
